things.name: Gyeongbokgung Palace
things.description: The grandest of Seoul's five Joseon palaces with the changing of the guard ceremony

things.name: Bukchon Hanok Village
things.description: 600-year-old district of traditional Korean hanok wooden houses

things.name: N Seoul Tower (Namsan Tower)
things.description: Hilltop tower with panoramic Seoul views accessible by cable car with love locks

things.name: Insadong & Bukchon Cultural District
things.description: Tea houses, galleries, street food and traditional crafts in Seoul's cultural heart

things.name: Myeongdong Shopping District
things.description: Seoul's most popular shopping street with K-beauty, street food and fashion

things.name: DMZ (Demilitarized Zone) Tour
things.description: Tour to the Korean border - Joint Security Area, Third Tunnel and Dora Observatory

things.name: Dongdaemun Design Plaza (DDP)
things.description: Zaha Hadid's futuristic design landmark with exhibitions and a night market

things.name: Lotte World Tower Sky100
things.description: Observation deck on the 100th floor of Korea's tallest building with glass floor

things.name: Noryangjin Fish Market
things.description: 24-hour wholesale seafood market where you buy fish and have it prepared upstairs

things.name: Korean Jjimjilbang (Sauna)
things.description: Korean public bathhouse culture with themed hot rooms, cold pools and snack bars
